episode: Setting the Record Straight: I Was Forced to Respond

records.title: Setting the Record Straight: I Was Forced to Respond
records.description_excerpt:
After being publicly mentioned multiple times during recent meetings and political discussions involving Downey Councilmember Mario Trujillo, former Mayor Mario Guerra says enough is enough.
